## [09:09 - 12:08]

Now just a side note is that typically will I'll email twice to that squeeze page for PLC one I'll email the first time and then I'll typically go in and I'll mail the Unopens the people that didn't open that first email and again every email service provider is different But pretty much all of them give you that capability to go in and say hey I want to take all the people that didn't open that email and I want to send them another email and I'll send them a second email Again inviting them to go to that squeeze page and get the launch so then after they after you do this then They're on your launch list and once they're on your launch list Then you send them an email and PLC to is released Then you send them the email and PLC is released and then you'll send them all your open cart emails once they're on your launch list so what will typically do here is You will mail your entire list into each PLC into a squeeze page for each PLC And like I said, I'll actually mail my unopens So I'll email and to squeeze the squeeze page for PLC one and then I'll end up emailing my unopens And they'll do the same thing for PLC two and the same thing for PLC three I'll also usually email the entire list about My open cart and I'll email them about the closed cart now if they're in the launch list They'll end up getting a lot more emails than just these emails just these five emails They'll get quite a bit more But they'll generally send the entire list of these five emails and when you're sending the email Especially about the squeeze pages You'll want to exclude everyone's who's already on your launch list again Every email service provider is different, but they pretty much all allow you to do this so if Going back to Fred if Fred has joined your launch list already You don't want him getting the email when you send it to your full list about About the second PLC about PLC two So you will exclude everyone on the launch list and that's Fred won't get that email.
